title: Risk Register + Change Management — CAB Approval Workflow & Risk Linkage
description: change_management.py has a full ITIL-aligned 9-state FSM with CAB workflow, SLA auto-expiry, and rollback planning. test_risk_register.py and test_change_management.py confirm both engines exist with good coverage. However, risk register entries are not linked to change requests — approving a change does not reduce the associated risk score, and dark web monitoring alerts do not auto-create change requests for credential-related risks.
missing: Bidirectional link: change_request.risk_register_id FK + on approval/rollback auto-update linked risk treatment status in risk_register.db
Dark web → change request automation: when DarkWebMonitoring detects a credential exposure, auto-create a NORMAL change request for credential rotation
Change freeze calendar API: /api/v1/change-management/freeze-periods that blocks change creation during compliance audit windows and maintenance freezes
